title: System update available
new_features: Added BLE pairing and bonding support
Added custom INFO and SENSOR commands for the app
improvements: Improved BLE reconnect behavior after disconnect
Improved security with encrypted characteristic access
Improved Android compatibility with standard BLE services
Restored DHT22 temperature and humidity reporting
Added periodic sensor notifications over the custom TX channel
notes: Pair the device again after flashing this firmware if Android cached an older bond.
Keep the phone close to the device during updates and setup.
The device may reboot or reconnect during firmware-related changes.
